seoTitle: Quantong vs Quarry Hill — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Quantong and Quarry Hill. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Quantong vs Quarry Hill: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Quantong and Quarry Hill.
heading: Quantong vs Quarry Hill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Quantong, Victoria and Quarry Hill, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Quantong has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Quarry Hill (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Quantong or Quarry Hill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Quantong has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Quarry Hill scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Quantong scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Quarry Hill scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Quantong or Quarry Hill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Quantong has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
